_comment: Joss Flame Source (configured_feature) — a soul campfire representing a mortal village temple/shrine where mortal worship generates Joss Flames. Canon: 'Joss Flames (xiang huo) are cultivation energy produced by mortal faith. Mortals worship -> generate Joss Flames -> cultivators collect.' The soul_campfire block is the objective-world anchor: a mortal sees a small shrine fire; a Soul Formation+ cultivator perceives the flame column as a Joss Flame Source. Per the Prime Directive: the soul_campfire exists regardless of perception; what changes is what the player understands about it. Placement: surface, near villages (configured via placed_feature rarity).
